---
title: "Resources"
format: html
---

### Prompt Best Practices

::: grey-box
**The fundamentals that work across all LLMs:**

-   **Role/Persona:** Who the AI should act as

-   **Context:** What background info it needs

-   **Task:** What you want it to do explicitly

-   **Format:** How you want the output structured

-   **Constraints:** What to avoid or limits to follow
:::

<br> **Source:** [Reddit: Best Practices for AI Prompting 2025?](https://www.reddit.com/r/ChatGPTPromptGenius/comments/1nytjzy/best_practices_for_ai_prompting_2025)

### CO-STAR Prompt Framework

::: {.grey-box}
A great prompt usually includes these specific elements to provide context and direction:

-   **Context:** Provide background information on the task.

-   **Objective:** Define exactly what you want me to do.

-   **Style:** Specify a writing style (e.g., professional, humorous, poetic).

-   **Tone:** Set the emotional vibe (e.g., empathetic, direct, enthusiastic).

-   **Audience:** Who is this for? (e.g., a CEO, a 5-year-old, a software engineer).

-   **Response:** Define the format (e.g., a table, a list, a JSON object).

*Additional Components*

-   **Few-Shot Prompting/Using Examples:** Provide examples of desired output and formatting (e.g., programming language, file type [CSV, Markdown, PNG])

-   **Use Delimiters:** Use triple quotes ("""), XML tags (<text></text>), or dashes (---) to wrap your content (e.g., Summarize the text delimited by triple quotes: """[Insert article]""")
:::

<br> 

**Source:** Google Gemini (*Prompt:* do you have any prompt engineering best practices)

### Chicago Booth Algorithmic Bias Initiative 

-   [Algorithmic Bias Initiative Website](https://www.chicagobooth.edu/research/center-for-applied-artificial-intelligence/research/algorithmic-bias)
-   [Algorithmic Bias Playbook](https://www.chicagobooth.edu/research/center-for-applied-artificial-intelligence/research/algorithmic-bias/playbook)

## Coding and Data Analysis with LLMs

### Integrated Development Environments (IDEs)

#### VS Code

-   [Download](https://code.visualstudio.com/)
-   [Documentation](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs)
#### Positron 

-   [Download](https://positron.posit.co/)
-   [Documentation](https://positron.posit.co/welcome.html)

### Coding LLMs


#### Claude Code

-   [Getting Started](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/overview)
-   [Configuration Scopes](https://code.claude.com/docs/en/settings#configuration-scopes)

#### Codex

-   [Codex](https://chatgpt.com/codex)
-   [Sandboxing](https://developers.openai.com/codex/concepts/sandboxing)

#### Google AI Studio

-   [AI Studio](https://aistudio.google.com/)
-   [Documentation](https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api/docs)

### Melissa Van Bussel posit::conf 2024 Keynote

-   [Practical Tips for Using Generative AI in Data Science Workflows](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rPeOdc8jTSE)
-   [Slides](https://github.com/melissavanbussel/posit-conf-2024?tab=readme-ov-file)

### EHI Living Manual (EPIC) 

-   [EHI Living Manual](https://joshuamandel.com/ehi-living-manual/)

### Visualize Effects of Temperature, Top-P, and Top-K Parameters

-   [Website](https://andreban.github.io/temperature-topk-visualizer/)

### Recommended Books

-   [Deep Learning Illustrated](https://www.deeplearningillustrated.com/)
-   [The StatQuest Illustrated Guide to Neural Networks and AI](https://statquest.org/index.html)



### Additional Prompt Engineering and Other Resources

#### Anthropic

-   [Prompt Engineering Guide Overview](https://platform.claude.com/docs/en/build-with-claude/prompt-engineering/overview){target="_blank"}
-   [Prompt Engineering Interactive Tutorial](https://github.com/anthropics/prompt-eng-interactive-tutorial){target="_blank"}

#### OpenAI

-   [OpenAI Tokenizer](https://platform.openai.com/tokenizer)
-   [OpenAI Developers Cookbook](https://developers.openai.com/cookbook)
-   [OpenAI ChatGPT Cookbook](https://developers.openai.com/cookbook/topic/chatgpt)
-   [OpenAI Cookbook Code Repo](https://github.com/openai/openai-cookbook)
-   [Best Practices for Prompt Engineering with the OpenAI API](https://help.openai.com/en/articles/6654000-best-practices-for-prompt-engineering-with-the-openai-api)
-   [Prompt Engineering](https://developers.openai.com/api/docs/guides/prompt-engineering/)

#### Google

-   [Prompt engineering: overview and guide](https://cloud.google.com/discover/what-is-prompt-engineering)

#### 10 Best Practices for Prompt Engineering With Any Model

-   [PromptHub](https://www.prompthub.us/blog/10-best-practices-for-prompt-engineering-with-any-model)

#### GitHub: Awesome AI System Prompts

-   [Awesome AI System Prompts](https://github.com/dontriskit/awesome-ai-system-prompts)

#### PubMed API

-   [Entrez® Programming Utilities Help](https://www.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/books/NBK25501/)
